description: Accounts (and pen trials) in Ladino and western Arabic numerals. The shelfmarks ENA 3077.8–13 all appear to be related, including pen trials, accounts, and poetry in Ladino. On ENA 3077.13, there is an ownership note by Eliyya Toko (? טוקו). Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בLadino. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
